author: codex

scope.description: Codex-only deterministic identity cleanup prep for global corridor and route records only.
scope.selection_policy: Only high-confidence same-route or same-corridor-geography aliases were queued. Low-confidence, phase-specific, different-limit, and local/SBS/LTD/express/subway variant conflicts were excluded.

aliases.reason: Same global B47 bus route in the Grand Avenue / Metropolitan Avenue / Queens Boulevard records. The alias and canonical records have the same route_id B47, Brooklyn route context, and no conflicting service variant; the alias explicitly normalizes to local service while the canonical record carries no contrary variant.
aliases.guard_notes: Route merge guard satisfied: exact route_id match and no local/SBS/LTD/express/subway conflict. Do not generalize this to other B47 records without checking service variant.

aliases.reason: Same global B57 bus route in the Grand Avenue / Metropolitan Avenue / Queens Boulevard records. The alias and canonical records have the same route_id B57, Brooklyn route context, and no conflicting service variant; the alias explicitly normalizes to local service while the canonical record carries no contrary variant.
aliases.guard_notes: Route merge guard satisfied: exact route_id match and no local/SBS/LTD/express/subway conflict. Do not merge with any non-B57 route sharing the same corridor.

aliases.reason: Same global B83 route in Southern Brooklyn B82 context. Both records have route_id B83 and Brooklyn context; the alias identifies local service, while the canonical record has no conflicting service variant and already aggregates December 2017 and January 2018 B82 corridor references.
aliases.guard_notes: Route merge guard satisfied: exact route_id match and compatible service typing. This does not merge B82 Local, B82 Limited, B82 SBS, BM2, or BM5 records.

aliases.reason: Same global B67 bus route in Flatbush Avenue records. Both records have route_id B67 and Brooklyn context; the canonical record explicitly normalizes to local service and the alias has no conflicting service variant/type.
aliases.guard_notes: Route merge guard satisfied: exact route_id match, no service-variant conflict, and same Flatbush Avenue route-list context. Do not use this as evidence to merge B69/B45/B103/Q35 records from the same map.

aliases.canonical_name: Flatlands Ave (E 103 St to Pennsylvania Ave)
aliases.alias_name: Flatlands Ave (E 103 St to Pennsylvania Ave)
aliases.reason: Same Flatlands Avenue corridor segment in Brooklyn. Both records name Flatlands Ave and carry identical limits, E 103 St to Pennsylvania Ave, with no borough or phase-specific geography conflict.
aliases.guard_notes: Corridor merge guard satisfied: identical named segment and limits. Excludes broader Flatlands Avenue corridor records with different or missing limits.

aliases.canonical_name: Pennsylvania Ave (Flatlands Ave to Seaview Ave)
aliases.alias_name: Pennsylvania Ave (Flatlands Ave to Seaview Ave)
aliases.reason: Same Pennsylvania Avenue corridor segment in Brooklyn. Both records name Pennsylvania Ave and carry identical Flatlands Ave to Seaview Ave limits, with no borough or phase-specific geography conflict.
aliases.guard_notes: Corridor merge guard satisfied: identical named segment and limits. Excludes broader Pennsylvania Avenue or B82 corridor records without this exact segment scope.

aliases.reason: Same Cross Bay Boulevard corridor segment in Queens. Both records identify Cross Bay Boulevard north of 165 Av and carry the same limits, north of 165 Av.
aliases.guard_notes: Corridor merge guard satisfied: same borough and same north-of-165-Av segment. Excludes Cross Bay Boulevard records at Liberty/109 Av, Rockaway-to-165, or broader SBS corridor scopes.

aliases.canonical_name: Utica Avenue from Carroll Street to Church Avenue
aliases.reason: Same Utica Avenue corridor segment in Brooklyn. Both records name Utica Avenue and carry the same Carroll St. to Church Ave. limits; the alias is a study-area phrasing of the same segment.
aliases.guard_notes: Corridor merge guard satisfied: same named street and same Carroll-to-Church limits. Excludes Utica Avenue records for St. Johns-to-Carroll or Avenue U-to-DeKalb.

exclusions_and_guards: Excluded aliases already present in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.

Excluded aliases already prepared in visible data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch047-prep.json through codex-identity-batch114-prep.json; batch115 and batch116 prep files were not visible in this worktree.
Excluded entity, project, and treatment_component records entirely.
Excluded route pairs with explicit local/SBS/LTD/express/subway conflicts, including B44/B46 broad BRT phase records and other route_id-only false friends.
Excluded corridor pairs with different limits, broader/narrower corridor scope, uncertain borough, or phase/candidate-only scope ambiguity.
command_evidence: node read-only scan over data/canonical/routes.jsonl, data/canonical/corridors.jsonl, data/identity-overrides/merges.json, and visible codex identity prep artifacts to find same-kind candidates not already applied/prepared
node read-only compact evidence extraction for selected route and corridor records

node read-only selected-alias conflict check reported in_merges=false and in_prior_prep=false for all 8 selected aliases; visible identity prep range was batch047 through batch114, with batch115 and batch116 not visible

local_validation.notes: Validation is local/deterministic only. No materialize, validate, provider-backed review, canonicalize, export-jsonl, DB publish, or DB repair commands were run.
